data.name: Loving Slaves - Season 1
data.detailed_description:
Your best friend really came through, showing up one day with two slaves, Riley and Ashley, and even handing over their own slave, Giselle, as a gift. Now you’re living in an apartment with them, and life is way more interesting. They’re always around, keeping things fun and giving you a solid crew to roll with wherever you go.

At work, they tag along, making the day less boring and even helping out with stuff. When you’re out with your friends, they’re part of the group, and they definitely help you stand out a little more. Whether it’s just hanging out or trying to impress someone new, they always make things more fun and way easier for you.

Back at the apartment, it’s all about kicking back and doing whatever feels right. With Riley, Ashley, and Giselle around, there’s always something going on, and life’s never dull. Whether you’re out and about or just hanging at home, they’re there to keep the good times rolling.

Whether it’s just hanging out or trying to impress someone new, they always make things more fun and way easier for you.

Back at the apartment, it’s all about kicking back and doing whatever feels right. With Riley, Ashley, and Giselle around, there’s always something going on, and life’s never dull. Whether you’re out and about or just hanging at home, they’re there to keep the good times rolling.
data.short_description: Your best friend surprises you with three loyal slaves—Riley, Ashley, and Giselle—ready to bring fun and excitement to your life. Take them to work, hang out with friends, and charm the ladies, all while enjoying a carefree life at your apartment. Relax, explore, and live your dream life.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 110 MB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
